name: X-Golf Bend
address: 389 SW Scalehouse Ct Suite 105, Bend, OR 97702
about: X-Golf Bend offers indoor golf simulation experiences using state-of-the-art technology. The venue provides a full bar and food service, making it a social hub for golfers. Pricing is per bay per hour, accommodating up to six people per bay, with different rates for weekdays and weekends. It is suitable for both serious practice sessions and casual rounds with friends.
why_golfers_like_it: Full bar and food service available
Suitable for both practice and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available.
Full bar service with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rental clubs are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned; the venue has its own full bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. For multiple players, it may take an additional hour per person.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
